source_details.title: Effects of Vitaxin, a novel therapeutic in trial for metastatic bone tumors, on osteoclast functions in vitro.

evidence_excerpt: in conclusion, vitaxin decreases resorption by impairing osteoclast attachment, without affecting osteoclast formation and multinucleation. our data also show that vitaxin's inhibitory effects on osteoclasts can be modulated by factors known to alter the conformation of alphavbeta3.
